name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORTIF_GATE_COMPLEX
notes: FORTIF PACK. GATE COMPLEX: a drive-through base-entrance mouth. Land_BarGate2 boom gate in the center (CONFIG-VERIFIED: arma2-co-config-reference CfgVehicles.txt:116856, class Land_BarGate2 : Land_HBarrier_large; ENGINE-MEASURED on the offline 1.64 rig: long axis is model Y, dy = 8.24 m -> placed at relDir 90 so the bar spans the wall line's X axis, covering x in [-4.12,4.12]). Two flanking Concrete_Wall_EP1 PAIRS at the HQ 2.2 m pitch on each side: inner panels at x = +/-4.9 span 3.61..6.19 m, overlapping the gate's measured extent (to 4.12 m) - no seam at the gate/wall junction; outer edge ~ +/-8.4 m -> mouth ~ 17 m wide. Four Land_CncBlock_Stripes accents angled 25/335 deg (the proven WALLS_V4 gap-mouth accent idiom) form a slow-down funnel front and rear while leaving a ~4 m center drive lane clear. Passive, z=0.

objs.role: boom gate - the drive-through stop line (bar spans X at relDir 90)
left flank wall, inner panel (overlaps gate extent)
right flank wall, inner panel (overlaps gate extent)
front funnel accent left (angled in, lane stays clear)
